name: SpecForge
description: Train speculative decoding models effortlessly and port them smoothly to SGLang serving.
summaryZh: Train speculative decoding models effortlessly and port them smoothly to SGLang serving. 它主要面向代码场景，适合做 AI 编程助手、代码生成或自动修复。

fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。
